TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Horacio_Cartes, title = Horacio_Cartes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Horacio_Cartes} }

S.FORM: = Horacio Cartes = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 7 jiyax 5 ka Horacio Cartes ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Paraguay ta sayang o kiya ka Horacio Cartes, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 8 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ńßo…ĺa ¶io ¶a…ĺt…ôs = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka ńßo…ĺa ¶io ¶a…ĺt…ôs ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan pa…ĺaguaj ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßo…ĺa ¶io ¶a…ĺt…ôs, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. papak
